icici-prudential-large-cap-fund-direct-g.tax_notes: taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year. (Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/icici-prudential-large-cap-fund-direct-growth)
